# Standard Home Delivery

Orders to the taiwan-main-island arrive 3–5 business days after dispatch; shipments to the outlying islands—penghu, kinmen, and matsu—require an additional 1–3 business days. Standard shipping costs NT$80, with free shipping on orders of NT$1,000 or more.

[Source: shipping_delivery.md#standard-home-delivery]
